initial_candidates.sql:
WITH city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        c.cust_city_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.calendar_quarter_id = 1772 THEN s.amount_sold ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.calendar_quarter_id = 1776 THEN s.amount_sold ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'United States'
      AND s.promo_id = 999
      AND t.calendar_quarter_id IN (1772, 1776)
    GROUP BY p.prod_id, p.prod_name, c.cust_city_id
),
city_with_growth AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cust_city_id
    FROM city_sales
    WHERE q4_2019_sales > 0
      AND (q4_2020_sales - q4_2019_sales) / q4_2019_sales >= 0.20
),
product_city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.prod_id,
        cs.prod_name,
        cs.cust_city_id,
        cs.q4_2019_sales,
        cs.q4_2020_sales,
        (cs.q4_2020_sales - cs.q4_2019_sales) * 100.0 / NULLIF(cs.q4_2019_sales, 0) AS sales_pct_change,
        SUM(cs.q4_2019_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY cs.prod_id) AS prod_q4_2019_total,
        SUM(cs.q4_2020_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY cs.prod_id) AS prod_q4_2020_total,
        SUM(cs.q4_2019_sales) OVER () AS total_q4_2019,
        SUM(cs.q4_2020_sales) OVER () AS total_q4_2020
    FROM city_sales cs
    WHERE cs.cust_city_id IN (SELECT cust_city_id FROM city_with_growth)
),
product_sales_pct AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        (prod_q4_2020_total * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_q4_2020, 0)) - (prod_q4_2019_total * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_q4_2019, 0)) AS sales_share_pct_point_change,
        prod_q4_2020_total + prod_q4_2019_total AS total_sales
    FROM product_city_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name, prod_q4_2020_total, prod_q4_2019_total, total_q4_2020, total_q4_2019
),
top_products AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        sales_share_pct_point_change,
        total_sales,
        NTILE(5) OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_quintile
    FROM product_sales_pct
)
SELECT prod_name
FROM top_products
WHERE sales_quintile = 1
ORDER BY ABS(sales_share_pct_point_change) ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        c.cust_city_id,
        t.calendar_quarter_id,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS city_quarter_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'United States'
      AND s.promo_id = 999
      AND t.calendar_quarter_id IN (1772, 1776)
    GROUP BY p.prod_id, p.prod_name, c.cust_city_id, t.calendar_quarter_id
),
city_sales_pivot AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        cust_city_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = 1772 THEN city_quarter_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        MAX(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = 1776 THEN city_quarter_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales
    FROM city_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name, cust_city_id
),
city_with_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        cust_city_id,
        q4_2019_sales,
        q4_2020_sales,
        (q4_2020_sales - q4_2019_sales) * 100.0 / NULLIF(q4_2019_sales, 0) AS pct_change
    FROM city_sales_pivot
    WHERE q4_2019_sales > 0
      AND (q4_2020_sales - q4_2019_sales) * 100.0 / q4_2019_sales >= 20
),
product_total_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        SUM(q4_2019_sales) AS total_q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(q4_2020_sales) AS total_q4_2020_sales,
        SUM(q4_2019_sales + q4_2020_sales) AS total_sales
    FROM city_with_growth
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name
),
ranked_products AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        total_q4_2019_sales,
        total_q4_2020_sales,
        total_sales,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank_pct
    FROM product_total_sales
),
top_20_products AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM ranked_products
    WHERE sales_rank_pct >= 0.8
),
product_sales_share AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        total_q4_2019_sales,
        total_q4_2020_sales,
        total_q4_2019_sales + total_q4_2020_sales AS total_sales,
        CAST(total_q4_2019_sales AS REAL) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(total_q4_2019_sales) FROM top_20_products) AS share_2019_pct,
        CAST(total_q4_2020_sales AS REAL) * 100.0 / (SELECT SUM(total_q4_2020_sales) FROM top_20_products) AS share_2020_pct
    FROM top_20_products
)
SELECT 
    prod_name
FROM product_sales_share
ORDER BY ABS(share_2020_pct - share_2019_pct) ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        c.cust_city_id,
        t.calendar_quarter_id,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS city_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'United States'
      AND s.promo_id = 999
      AND t.calendar_quarter_id IN (1772, 1776)
    GROUP BY p.prod_id, p.prod_name, c.cust_city_id, t.calendar_quarter_id
),
city_sales_pivot AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        cust_city_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = 1772 THEN city_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = 1776 THEN city_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales
    FROM city_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name, cust_city_id
),
qualified_cities AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cust_city_id
    FROM city_sales_pivot
    WHERE q4_2019_sales > 0 
      AND (q4_2020_sales - q4_2019_sales) * 100.0 / q4_2019_sales >= 20
),
product_city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.prod_id,
        cs.prod_name,
        cs.cust_city_id,
        cs.q4_2019_sales,
        cs.q4_2020_sales
    FROM city_sales_pivot cs
    WHERE cs.cust_city_id IN (SELECT cust_city_id FROM qualified_cities)
),
product_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        SUM(q4_2019_sales) AS total_q4_2019,
        SUM(q4_2020_sales) AS total_q4_2020,
        SUM(q4_2019_sales) + SUM(q4_2020_sales) AS total_sales
    FROM product_city_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name
),
product_shares AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        total_q4_2019,
        total_q4_2020,
        total_sales,
        CAST(total_q4_2019 AS REAL) / SUM(total_q4_2019) OVER () AS share_2019,
        CAST(total_q4_2020 AS REAL) / SUM(total_q4_2020) OVER () AS share_2020
    FROM product_totals
),
ranked_products AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        share_2019,
        share_2020,
        (share_2020 - share_2019) AS share_pct_change,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM product_shares
)
SELECT prod_name
FROM ranked_products
WHERE sales_rank >= 0.8
ORDER BY share_pct_change ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        c.cust_city_id,
        t.calendar_quarter_id,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS city_quarter_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'United States'
      AND s.promo_id = 999
      AND t.calendar_quarter_id IN (1772, 1776)
    GROUP BY p.prod_id, p.prod_name, c.cust_city_id, t.calendar_quarter_id
),
city_q4_2019 AS (
    SELECT prod_id, cust_city_id, city_quarter_sales AS q4_2019_sales
    FROM city_sales
    WHERE calendar_quarter_id = 1772
),
city_q4_2020 AS (
    SELECT prod_id, cust_city_id, city_quarter_sales AS q4_2020_sales
    FROM city_sales
    WHERE calendar_quarter_id = 1776
),
city_sales_change AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(q2019.prod_id, q2020.prod_id) AS prod_id,
        COALESCE(q2019.cust_city_id, q2020.cust_city_id) AS cust_city_id,
        COALESCE(q2019.q4_2019_sales, 0) AS q4_2019_sales,
        COALESCE(q2020.q4_2020_sales, 0) AS q4_2020_sales,
        CASE 
            WHEN q2019.q4_2019_sales > 0 THEN 
                (q2020.q4_2020_sales - q2019.q4_2019_sales) * 100.0 / q2019.q4_2019_sales
            ELSE NULL 
        END AS sales_pct_change
    FROM city_q4_2019 q2019
    FULL OUTER JOIN city_q4_2020 q2020 
        ON q2019.prod_id = q2020.prod_id 
        AND q2019.cust_city_id = q2020.cust_city_id
),
qualifying_cities AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cust_city_id
    FROM city_sales_change
    WHERE sales_pct_change >= 20
),
product_total_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.prod_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN cs.calendar_quarter_id = 1772 THEN cs.city_quarter_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN cs.calendar_quarter_id = 1776 THEN cs.city_quarter_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales,
        SUM(cs.city_quarter_sales) AS total_sales
    FROM city_sales cs
    JOIN qualifying_cities qc ON cs.cust_city_id = qc.cust_city_id
    GROUP BY cs.prod_id
),
product_sales_pct AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        q4_2019_sales,
        q4_2020_sales,
        total_sales,
        CASE 
            WHEN q4_2019_sales > 0 THEN q4_2019_sales * 100.0 / total_sales 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS pct_2019,
        CASE 
            WHEN q4_2020_sales > 0 THEN q4_2020_sales * 100.0 / total_sales 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS pct_2020,
        CASE 
            WHEN q4_2019_sales > 0 THEN 
                (q4_2020_sales * 100.0 / total_sales) - (q4_2019_sales * 100.0 / total_sales)
            ELSE 0 
        END AS sales_pct_point_change
    FROM product_total_sales
),
top_20_percent AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        q4_2019_sales,
        q4_2020_sales,
        total_sales,
        pct_2019,
        pct_2020,
        sales_pct_point_change,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank_pct
    FROM product_sales_pct
)
SELECT prod_id
FROM top_20_percent
WHERE sales_rank_pct >= 0.8
ORDER BY sales_pct_point_change ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        c.cust_city_id,
        t.calendar_quarter_id,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS q_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'United States'
      AND s.promo_id = 999
      AND t.calendar_quarter_id IN (1772, 1776)
    GROUP BY p.prod_id, p.prod_name, c.cust_city_id, t.calendar_quarter_id
),
city_q4_comparison AS (
    SELECT 
        cs1.prod_id,
        cs1.prod_name,
        cs1.cust_city_id,
        cs1.q_sales AS q4_2019_sales,
        cs2.q_sales AS q4_2020_sales,
        (cs2.q_sales - cs1.q_sales) * 100.0 / NULLIF(cs1.q_sales, 0) AS sales_pct_change
    FROM city_sales cs1
    JOIN city_sales cs2 
        ON cs1.prod_id = cs2.prod_id 
        AND cs1.cust_city_id = cs2.cust_city_id
    WHERE cs1.calendar_quarter_id = 1772
      AND cs2.calendar_quarter_id = 1776
      AND (cs2.q_sales - cs1.q_sales) * 100.0 / NULLIF(cs1.q_sales, 0) >= 20
),
product_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        s.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.calendar_quarter_id = 1772 THEN s.amount_sold ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_total,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.calendar_quarter_id = 1776 THEN s.amount_sold ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_total,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS total_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'United States'
      AND s.promo_id = 999
      AND t.calendar_quarter_id IN (1772, 1776)
    GROUP BY s.prod_id, p.prod_name
),
top_20_products AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        q4_2019_total,
        q4_2020_total,
        total_sales,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank_pct
    FROM product_totals
    WHERE sales_rank_pct <= 0.20
),
product_share_change AS (
    SELECT 
        t20.prod_id,
        t20.prod_name,
        t20.q4_2019_total,
        t20.q4_2020_total,
        t20.total_sales,
        (t20.q4_2019_total * 100.0 / SUM(t20.q4_2019_total) OVER ()) AS share_2019,
        (t20.q4_2020_total * 100.0 / SUM(t20.q4_2020_total) OVER ()) AS share_2020,
        ((t20.q4_2020_total * 100.0 / SUM(t20.q4_2020_total) OVER ()) - 
         (t20.q4_19_total * 100.0 / SUM(t20.q4_2019_total) OVER ())) AS share_pct_point_change
    FROM top_20_products t20
),
valid_products AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.prod_id,
        ps.prod_name,
        ps.share_pct_point_change,
        cqc.sales_pct_change
    FROM product_share_change ps
    JOIN city_q4_comparison cqc ON ps.prod_id = cqc.prod_id
)
SELECT 
    prod_id,
    prod_name
FROM valid_products
ORDER BY ABS(share_pct_point_change) ASC
LIMIT 1;
initial_candidates.exec_error: misuse of aliased window function sales_rank_pct

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        p.prod_id,
        p.prod_name,
        c.cust_city_id,
        t.calendar_quarter_id,
        SUM(s.amount_sold) AS city_sales
    FROM sales s
    JOIN products p ON s.prod_id = p.prod_id
    JOIN customers c ON s.cust_id = c.cust_id
    JOIN countries co ON c.country_id = co.country_id
    JOIN times t ON s.time_id = t.time_id
    WHERE co.country_name = 'United States'
      AND s.promo_id = 999
      AND t.calendar_quarter_id IN (1772, 1776)
    GROUP BY p.prod_id, p.prod_name, c.cust_city_id, t.calendar_quarter_id
),
city_sales_pivot AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        cust_city_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = 1772 THEN city_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2019_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN calendar_quarter_id = 1776 THEN city_sales ELSE 0 END) AS q4_2020_sales
    FROM city_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name, cust_city_id
),
qualified_cities AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cust_city_id
    FROM city_sales_pivot
    WHERE q4_2019_sales > 0 
      AND (q4_2020_sales - q4_2019_sales) * 100.0 / q4_2019_sales >= 20
),
product_city_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.prod_id,
        cs.prod_name,
        cs.cust_city_id,
        cs.q4_2019_sales,
        cs.q4_2020_sales
    FROM city_sales_pivot cs
    WHERE cs.cust_city_id IN (SELECT cust_city_id FROM qualified_cities)
),
product_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        SUM(q4_2019_sales) AS total_q4_2019,
        SUM(q4_2020_sales) AS total_q4_2020,
        SUM(q4_2019_sales) + SUM(q4_2020_sales) AS total_sales
    FROM product_city_sales
    GROUP BY prod_id, prod_name
),
product_shares AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        total_q4_2019,
        total_q4_2020,
        total_sales,
        CAST(total_q4_2019 AS REAL) / SUM(total_q4_2019) OVER () AS share_2019,
        CAST(total_q4_2020 AS REAL) / SUM(total_q4_2020) OVER () AS share_2020
    FROM product_totals
),
ranked_products AS (
    SELECT 
        prod_id,
        prod_name,
        share_2019,
        share_2020,
        (share_2020 - share_2019) AS share_pct_change,
        PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_sales DESC) AS sales_rank
    FROM product_shares
)
SELECT prod_name
FROM ranked_products
WHERE sales_rank >= 0.8
ORDER BY share_pct_change ASC
LIMIT 1;
